SARAH MITCHELL
Environmental Compliance Officer
Abu Dhabi, UAE
+971 55 987 6543
sarah.mitchell@email.com

PROFILE
Environmental compliance specialist with 7 years experience in UAE industrial sector. Focused on ESG reporting, waste management compliance, and environmental impact assessments. Strong background in ISO 14001 and sustainability frameworks.

EXPERIENCE

Environmental Compliance Lead | EcoSolutions ME | Abu Dhabi | 2019 – Present
• Led ESG compliance programs for 8 manufacturing clients
• Conducted environmental audits and gap assessments
• Prepared sustainability reports aligned with GRI standards
• Managed waste management licenses and hazardous materials protocols
• Liaised with Environment Agency Abu Dhabi (EAD) on regulatory matters

Compliance Coordinator | GreenField Industries | Sharjah | 2016 – 2019
• Monitored air and water quality compliance metrics
• Supported ISO 14001 certification process for 3 facilities
• Tracked regulatory changes and updated compliance matrices

QUALIFICATIONS
MSc Environmental Management | Heriot-Watt University Dubai | 2016
BSc Chemistry | University of Manchester | 2014

CERTIFICATIONS
• ISO 14001 Internal Auditor
• ESG Reporting Specialist
• Hazardous Waste Management (UAE)

TECHNICAL SKILLS
ESG Reporting, Environmental Auditing, ISO 14001, Waste Management, Regulatory Compliance, Sustainability Frameworks, Impact Assessment, Data Analysis

LANGUAGES
English (Native), Arabic (Conversational)
